name: BACARDÍ Carta Oro
short_description: A soothing rum balanced with notes of buttery caramel and zesty orange. BACARDÍ Gold ignites your glass with the flavors of sunshine.
tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum brings together rich, soothing flavours like vanilla, buttery caramel, toasted almond and sweet banana notes balanced by the warm zest of orange peel and a light, oaky finish. Nuts and butter Rich and toasted Dry and slightly sweet
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Carta Oro is a gold rum with a mellow, toasted character and golden color, aged in toasted oak barrels and charcoal filtered. It opens with a nutty, buttery aroma, then shows a rich, toasted palate of vanilla, buttery caramel, toasted almond, sweet banana, and zesty orange peel. The finish is light, oaky, dry, and slightly sweet, with a smooth, soothing texture. Best served in bold, punchy cocktails, especially a Cuba Libre or rum toddy. Useful search tags: gold rum, vanilla, caramel, banana, citrus, oak, mellow, smooth, cocktail rum.
display_description: A soothing rum balanced with notes of buttery caramel and zesty orange. BACARDÍ Gold ignites your glass with the flavors of sunshine.

evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Best for bursts of flavour. BACARDÍ Carta Oro craves zesty, punchy, and bold cocktails to acquaint with.
